title: Shared mailbox missing in Outlook

servicenow_seed.short_description: [TRAINING] Shared mailbox no longer appears in Outlook
servicenow_seed.description: User says the AP-Invoices shared mailbox disappeared from Outlook this morning. Other shared mailboxes still appear.

correct_steps: Check if user is still a member of the shared-mailbox permissions group
Test the shared mailbox in OWA to isolate client vs permissions
If permissions removed, restore via IAM workflow and re-add in Outlook
If user still has permission but mailbox is gone in OWA, escalate to Messaging
rationale: A missing shared mailbox is usually a permissions change. OWA isolates client cache vs real permission loss in one step.
hints: Check the permissions group, not just the mailbox.
learning_objectives: Use OWA to isolate Outlook client vs server-side issues
Map shared mailboxes to their access groups

tool_clues.ad: User is NOT a member of 'AP-Invoices-RW' group (was removed yesterday).
